recommendations.title: Z
recommendations.overview: A family find themselves terrorized by their eight-year-old son's imaginary friend.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Home for Rent
recommendations.overview: When her good tenants go bad, a landlord finds herself terrorized by a cult that seemingly has her husband enthralled — and her daughter in its sights.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: Next of Kin
recommendations.overview: After Linda inherits a retirement home, she witnesses a series of strange events which seem connected to a dark and unspeakable evil.

recommendations.title: The Scary of Sixty-First
recommendations.overview: Two roommates’ lives are upended after finding out that their new Manhattan apartment harbors a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Dark Water
recommendations.overview: A woman in the midst of an unpleasant divorce moves to an eerie apartment building with her young daughter. The ceiling of their apartment has a dark and active leak.

recommendations.title: The Abandoned
recommendations.overview: A troubled young woman who, in a last-ditch effort at getting her life together, takes a job working nights as a security guard at an abandoned luxury apartment building. Stuck with a brusque rent-a-cop as her partner, she tries to not let her mind p

recommendations.title: Tailgate
recommendations.overview: A cocksure, road-raging family man finds himself pursued and terrorized by the vengeful van driver he chooses to tailgate.

recommendations.title: Martyrs
recommendations.overview: A woman and her childhood friend seek out revenge on those who victimized and abused them.
